testcase.name: test_authorization_generation_detects_persisted_aba_without_public_leak
testcase.failure:
def test_authorization_generation_detects_persisted_aba_without_public_leak(): > first = _verified_snapshot(diagnostic_id="diag-a") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/agent/test_image_runtime_route_events.py:40: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
def _verified_snapshot( *, diagnostic_id: str = "diag-a", authorization_generation: int | None = None, ) -> dict[str, object]: state: dict[str, object] = { "schema_version": 1, "fingerprint": "fp-a", "status": "verified", "checked_at": "2026-07-17T00:00:00Z", "diagnostic_id": diagnostic_id, } if authorization_generation is not None: state["authorization_generation"] = authorization_generation > private_generation = image_runtime.verification_authorization_generation( ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ state, expected_fingerprint="fp-a", capability="image_generation", ) E AttributeError: module 'agent.image_runtime' has no attribute 'verification_authorization_generation'
tests/agent/test_image_runtime_route_events.py:22: AttributeError
